repository.workflowPolicy: Do not add, dispatch, rerun, or broaden workflows without explicit user approval.

blockingGates: A local shared-libmpv candidate has 24-DLL ordinary- and delay-import structural closure, package/source ownership evidence, a static-CRT target-OS/dynamic-load review, portable-root staging evidence, host playback evidence, and a clean Windows 11 Sandbox proof. It still lacks an approved redistribution profile, corresponding-source/legal disposition, and a selected Windows 10 minimum-image proof.
The Partner Center reservation state has not been checked and no exact package identity or publisher is recorded.

The original icon is embedded in the EXE and listing-art candidates are prepared, but no MSIX manifest, package-logo mapping, applicable Partner Center artwork-field confirmation, identity mapping, or deterministic Store packaging flow exists.
No WACK, developer-signed installed-package, update, uninstall, or clean-VM package proof exists.

A documented 300 x 300 app-tile candidate and additional artwork candidates are prepared, but applicable listing fields, public privacy/support pages, and rights-cleared bilingual Store screenshots have not been verified.
